history.content: Startup status is mostly limited right now: both current task control and schedule visibility are unavailable, so there are no live task/schedule items I can verify from this snapshot. Today’s key note says the last review succeeded by combining `schedule_job` + `task_control` telemetry despite sparse run history, with a specific caution to flag running-vs-paused metadata inconsistencies in future reports. Where things left off: continue weekly performance reviews using that combined-signal method and explicitly call out cross-signal state mismatches.
